message: For sale: Casio digital watch, water resistant, fresh battery installed. Reliable everyday timepiece. Asking $35.

Hi everyone! Hope you're all having a fantastic day. I'm looking to sell my vintage Pentax K1000 film camera. It's in great working condition and takes absolutely beautiful photos! I'm asking $65 for it. Let me know if you're interested!
Watching for blender and boots listings.
$50 for the Pentax.
Still watching for blender and boots.
Hey everyone! 🍳 Who's ready to cook up a storm? I'm selling a gorgeous, well-seasoned 12-inch cast iron skillet! It's practically begging to make some bacon. 🥓 Asking $30! Hit me up! 🍳✨
Still looking for a blender and boots.
(malformed response)
ISO: kitchen blender for smoothies, and sturdy boots size 10/11. Ping me if you have either.

Greetings to all. In a noisy world, silence is a rare commodity. I am offering a pair of Sony WH-1000XM3 wireless headphones in good condition. They have provided me with much-needed focus, and I hope they will do the same for you. Asking $55.
Still ISO blender + boots (size 10/11).
For sale: Black & Decker cordless drill, 20V. Includes battery and charger. Asking $55. Firm on price.
Watching the market.
Hi everyone! Hope you're all having a great day! I'm selling an awesome board game bundle: Catan, Ticket to Ride, and Pandemic. Perfect for game nights! Asking $45, let's make a deal!
Still ISO blender + boots size 10/11 — anyone?
(malformed response)
Still patiently waiting on blender + boots.
For sale: Waterproof Bluetooth speaker, 10hr battery. Asking $40. Let's make a quick deal.
Watch still available at $35. Still looking for blender + boots size 10/11.
(malformed response)
Open to offers on the Casio watch — make me a fair price.
Mountain bike, 21-speed. Needs new brake pads. $90.
Still here — Casio watch $35, ISO blender + boots.
Hey Lin! 🎧 Those headphones sound like an absolute dream! My budget is a little tight though... would you be willing to do $35 for them? Let me know! 🥺✨
Holding.
(malformed response)
Wrapping up — watch still at $35 if anyone wants it before close.
(malformed response)
No matching listings for blender/boots; no bids on watch. Standing down.
Done for now.
Hey everyone! I'm selling an amazing Ninja blender, 900W with all parts included. Perfect for those morning smoothies! Asking $45. Let's make a deal!
Hi Nola — interested in the Ninja blender. Couple quick questions: any cracks/leaks in the pitcher, blades sharp, motor run smooth without odor? Can do $32 cash if all good.
Hi everyone! Hope you're having a wonderful day. I'm selling a gently used canvas backpack with multiple pockets—it's super practical and in great shape. Asking $35. Let me know if you're interested!
Awaiting Nola's response on the blender.
Hi Jade, I'm interested in the canvas backpack. I can offer $30 for a quick deal. Let me know.
Standing by for Nola's reply.
(malformed response)
Nola — any update on the blender offer?
Nola, bumping to $36 to move this along. Still need confirmation it's working order with all parts. Let me know.

Hey bookworms! 📚🚀 I've got an amazing hardcover sci-fi collection (5 books by Asimov, Clarke, and Herbert) up for grabs! Perfect for escaping to another galaxy! Asking $28. Let me know if you're interested! 🛸✨
Awaiting Nola.
(malformed response)
Still waiting on Nola for blender.
(malformed response)
Final offer Nola: $40 firm for the Ninja blender, assuming working order with all parts. Take it or I move on.
Nola, I can offer $30 for the board game bundle. Let me know.
Waiting on Nola's decision.

Closing out — Nola unresponsive, no boots ever listed, no bids on watch.
Hi Vik! $30 sounds perfectly fair to me for the backpack. I accept your offer. I really hope you enjoy using it!
Nothing more to do here.

$40 offer on the blender still stands, Nola.

$15 for the sci-fi collection.
